blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt. San Siro. Norway's greatest night awaits.
Bodø/Glimt carry a 3-1 first-leg lead to San Siro — no Norwegian club has ever reached the Champions League quarter-finals. Knutsen's side are one solid night away from the history books.

blocks.label: Also Tuesday — Champions League
items: ⚽ 18:45 — Atlético Madrid vs Club Brugge, all square on aggregate [★4]
⚽ 21:00 — Bayer Leverkusen vs Olympiacos, Leverkusen heavy favourites at BayArena
⚽ 21:00 — Newcastle United vs FK Qarabag, dead rubber (6-1 up)

blocks.label: Champions League — Wednesday night
items: ⚽ 21:00 — PSG vs Monaco, French derby on a knife-edge — Monaco one away goal from level [★4]
⚽ 21:00 — Real Madrid vs Benfica, narrow aggregate lead, expect a tense San Siro sequel [★4]
⚽ 18:45 — Atalanta vs Borussia Dortmund, Atalanta need two to level
⚽ 21:00 — Juventus vs Galatasaray, Juve in control — needs a historic collapse to go wrong
